message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User" as User
participant "Frontend" as Frontend
participant "Clerk" as Clerk
participant "TicketMaster" as TicketMaster
participant "DB" as DB

Clerk >> ReservationService
Clerk >> TicketRepository
Clerk >> EventBus
TicketMaster >> TicketMasterService
TicketMaster >> TicketMasterRepository
TicketMaster >> OrderManager

User -> Frontend: reserve button
activate Frontend
Frontend -> Frontend: POST /reservations
note right of Frontend
  POST /reservations
  {
    tickets: [
      {
        programId: 1,
        sectorId: 1,
        seatId: 5
      },
      {
        programId: 1,
        sectorId: 1,
        seatId: 6
      }
    ]
  }
end note
Frontend -> ReservationService: POST /reservations
activate ReservationService
ReservationService -> TicketRepository: validate tickets
activate TicketRepository
TicketRepository --> ReservationService: validate tickets
deactivate TicketRepository

alt [invalid]
  ReservationService --> Frontend: ReservationRejected: code, reason
  Frontend --> User: show error msg
else [valid]
  ReservationService -> ReservationService: createReservationCommand
  activate ReservationService
  ReservationService -> EventBus: publish CreateReservation
  deactivate ReservationService
  ReservationService --> Frontend: ReservationAccepted: reservationId
  Frontend --> User: redirect user to Order page
end

alt [ReservationAccepted]
  ReservationService -> TicketMaster: handle CreateReservation
  activate TicketMaster
  TicketMaster -> TicketMasterRepository: check if all tickets are FREE
  activate TicketMasterRepository
  TicketMasterRepository --> TicketMaster: check if all tickets are FREE
  deactivate TicketMasterRepository

  alt [ticket status = FREE]
    TicketMaster -> TicketMasterRepository: set status of tickets to RESERVED
    activate TicketMasterRepository
    TicketMasterRepository --> TicketMaster: set status of tickets to RESERVED
    deactivate TicketMasterRepository
    TicketMaster -> EventBus: publish ReservationAccepted
  else [ticket status != FREE]
    TicketMaster -> EventBus: publish ReservationRejected
  end

  TicketMaster --> ReservationService: handle ReservationEvent
  deactivate TicketMaster

  alt [ReservationAccepted]
    ReservationService -> TicketMasterRepository: set status of tickets to RESERVED
    activate TicketMasterRepository
    TicketMasterRepository --> ReservationService: set status of tickets to RESERVED
    deactivate TicketMasterRepository
  else [ReservationRejected]
    ReservationService -> ReservationService: Noop
  end

  ReservationService -> Frontend: publish ReservationEvent on websocket
  Frontend --> User: redirect user to Order page
end

TicketMaster -> OrderManager: handle ReservationAccepted
activate OrderManager
OrderManager -> DB: save ReservedTicket object for each ticket
activate DB
DB --> OrderManager: save ReservedTicket object for each ticket
deactivate DB
OrderManager --> TicketMaster: handle ReservationAccepted
deactivate OrderManager

@enduml
